code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_boundary = false
  if i == n
    is_boundary = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 10 or v == 13
        is_boundary = true
      end
    when None
      is_boundary = true
    end
  end
  if is_boundary
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
let tn = tokens.len()
mut j = 0
while j < tn
  match tokens.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if not have_prev
      result = list.push(result, v)
      prev = v
      have_prev = true
    else if v != prev
      result = list.push(result, v)
      prev = v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
let rn = result.len()
mut k = 0
while k < rn
  match result.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
